page_content:
PSYC361 Survey of Industrial and Organizational Psychology (3 Credits) A general survey of the ﬁeld of industrial organizational psychology including such topics as organizational entry (recruitment, selection, training, socialization); organizational psychology (motivation, leadership, job attitudes); productivity in the workplace (performance appraisal, absenteeism, turnover), and the role that the larger environment plays in influencing work behaviors and work attitudes. Prerequisite: PSYC100.

PSYC362 Introduction to Negotiation (3 Credits) Overview of the ﬁeld of negotiation and the social-psychological and contextual factors that facilitate and inhibit successful negotiation agreements. Students will engage in a variety of negotiation exercises individually and as a team. Restriction: Must be in Psychology program or Social Data Science - Psychology Track.
